title: polygonum kelloggii var. esotericum
intro: Polygonum kelloggii var. esotericum, also known as Kellogg's knotweed, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Polygonum kelloggii plant, a type of flowering plant native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygonum kelloggii var. esotericum are said to include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
